EXPLORE_SECTION_SORT_ORDER_UPDATED: Explore sections sort order updated successfully
EXPLORE_SECTION_ITEMS_ADDED: Items added to explore section successfully
EXPLORE_SECTION_ITEMS_ADDED_WITH_DUPLICA: Some items were added to explore section, others were skipped as they already exist
EXPLORE_SECTION_ITEMS_ALREADY_EXIST: All items already exist in this section
EXPLORE_SECTION_ITEMS_REMOVED: Items removed from explore section successfully
EXPLORE_SECTION_ITEMS_NOT_FOUND: One or more explore section items not found
EXPLORE_SECTION_ITEMS_REQUIRED: Please provide at least one item ID to remove
EXPLORE_SECTION_ITEMS_SORT_ORDER_MISMATC: Item list is out of date — refresh and try again
COLLECTION_HAS_NO_TEMPLATES: The selected collection has no templates
EXPLORE_SECTION_ITEMS_PACK_ONLY: This section only allows packs. Please add pack items only.
EXPLORE_SECTION_ITEMS_PACK_TEMPLATES_LIM: Sections of type PACK_TEMPLATES can contain only one pack. Remove the existing pack before adding a new one.
EXPLORE_SECTION_NOT_FOUND_FOR_ITEMS: Cannot add items: parent section was not found or has been archived
